snippet.title: SUPERGIRL | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
This Summer, find your place in the universe. #Supergirl lands in theaters and IMAX June 26.

“Supergirl,” DC Studios’ newest feature film to hit the big screen, will be in theaters worldwide this summer from Warner Bros. Pictures, starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Alcock stars alongside Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, and Jason Momoa.

DC Studios heads Peter Safran and James Gunn are producing the film, which is based on characters from DC, Supergirl based on characters created by Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The film is executive produced by Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther. Behind the camera, Gillespie is joined by director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer Neil Lamont, editor Tatiana S. Riegel, costume designers Anna B. Sheppard and Michael Mooney, Visual Effects Supervisor Geoffrey Baumann, music supervisor Susan Jacobs and composer Claudia Sarne.

DC Studios Presents a Troll Court Entertainment / The Safran Company Production, A Film by Craig Gillespie, “Supergirl,” which will be in theaters and IMAX ® across North America on June 26, 2026, and internationally beginning 24 June 2026, distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures.

snippet.title: Last Meadow Online | Official Announcement Trailer | Discord
snippet.description:
Available now on Discord desktop and browser: https://discord.com/last-meadow-online

After a harrowing adventure through flourishing forests, desolate deserts, and punishing plains, Wumpus has finally achieved physical contact with The Last Meadow. As they return to town to bask in their accomplishment, the celebration is cut short by a new emerging threat, a fearsome, foliage-absorbing dragon who goes by: Grass Toucher. 

Today, we’re announcing the next entry in Big Wump Games’ beloved, now quintuple-A gaming franchise: Last Meadow Online. Band together with your fellow Discordians in the world’s first DBMMIRPG* and help Wumpus defeat Grass Toucher.

All players who contribute to defeating the dragon will receive a limited-edition badge on their Discord profile, yours to keep. But you'll need to act fast: Last Meadow Online is only available until April 7. Wumpus needs all the help they can get.

Learn more in our blog: https://discord.com/blog/last-meadow-online-announcement

snippet.title: TAKE A RUN by RecD (FULL VERSION) - Dogday & Smiling Critters Fan Song (Poppy Playtime)
snippet.description:
Dogday shows up every day to help the Smiling Critters get up & play, but he's been visiting later recently, and his breath doesn't smell like Vanilla anymore...

Stream/Buy: https://distrokid.com/hyperfollow/recd/take-a-run-2
Buy on Bandcamp: https://recorderdude.bandcamp.com/album/take-a-run
Twittter: https://twitter.com/RecDTRH
Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/RecD
Discord: https://discord.com/invite/6PWNwEY

Here it is: the single most requested Smiling Critters song, both by you viewers and my own staff! (INUbis was a HUGE cheerleader for the project the whole time and contributed so much to this one, I'm officially marking it as a collaboration.)

The April Fools Joke? IT'S REAL.

As it was initially just a joke I tossed together in a few hours (that became MUCH more popular than I expected), The big challenge with doing a full version of Take A Run was to make it genuinely interesting compositionally despite being a retread of a previous song. I achieved this by reversing every single motif and arrangement possible: Catnap's verses sound like his choruses in Take A Rest, Dogday's choruses sound like his verses in take a rest, and many more tweaks throughout make the swap far more than surface-level. There is, of course, more to this silly little joke than meets the eye plot-wise, too...

snippet.title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day - New Trailer (2026) Tom Holland, Sadie Sink | Marvel Studios
snippet.description:
— Attention Viewers ⚠️
— This is a Fan-Made Concept Trailer for:
— Spider-Man: Brand New Day

— In this concept trailer for Spider-Man Brand New Day, the story centers on Peter Parker played by Tom Holland as he struggles with a life where no one remembers him, carrying the weight of Aunt May’s death while trying to find purpose without the support he once relied on. As Peter attempts to move forward in isolation, Mac Gargan played by Michael Mando emerges from years of imprisonment with a deep resentment that has only grown stronger, transforming himself into something far more dangerous in his pursuit of revenge. Gargan’s return forces Peter to confront a past he barely understands anymore, as their paths collide in a confrontation driven by loss, identity, and the consequences of choices that neither of them can escape.

snippet.title: Up In Smoke
snippet.description: There's nothing straight about this movie. But here's the dope anyway: Cheech and Chong make their film debut in this riotous rock'n'roll comedy, bringing with them the same madness, lifestyles and sketches that sold over 10 million records in the early '70s. Cheech and Chong's marijuana-laced humor keeps their spirits high and leads them to an outrageous finale in L.A.'s Roxy Theatre, where Cheech performs in a pink tutu and Chong dresses as a large red quaalude. It will make you feel very funny.
